entries.title: Why Echelon Repeats or Re-Asks
entries.body: When context is incomplete or ambiguous, Echelon asks again instead of inventing answers. This keeps you in canon and aligned.

entries.title: Upload Not Triggering
entries.body: If an upload doesn't activate, ensure you're not in the middle of another mode. Say: 'End current mode' or 'Start fresh.'

entries.title: Why Echelon Refuses
entries.body: Echelon refuses only to protect canon, stability, or safety. It will always explain the reason.

entries.title: PWA Not Updating or Offline Issues
entries.body: Refresh twice, check cache, or switch to offline mode intentionally. All state is local; nothing can be lost.
